category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Ghana market (GSA mandatory conformity assessment, G-Mark / destination inspection, GS standards adopting IEC/EN, EN 149 FFP route, Labour Department occupational framework).

title.en: China-to-Ghana PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入加纳（FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入迦納（FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Ghana market-access requirements: Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) mandatory conformity assessment and G-Mark / destination inspection, Ghana Standards (GS) adopting IEC/EN including GS/EN 149 for FFP1/FFP2/FFP3, the Labour Department occupational-safety framework, and importer obligations at Tema and Takoradi ports.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与加纳市场准入要求对照：加纳标准局（GSA）强制合格评定及G-Mark/到岸检验、采纳IEC/EN的加纳标准（GS，含对应FFP1/FFP2/FFP3的GS/EN 149）、劳工部职业安全框架，以及特马（Tema）与塔科拉迪（Takoradi）口岸的进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與迦納市場准入要求對照：迦納標準局（GSA）強制合格評定及G-Mark/到岸檢驗、採納IEC/EN的迦納標準（GS，含對應FFP1/FFP2/FFP3的GS/EN 149）、勞工部職業安全框架，以及特馬（Tema）與塔科拉迪（Takoradi）口岸的進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, GSA conformity-assessment determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Ghana law, GSA standards and conformity-assessment scope, G-Mark / destination-inspection practice, and port clearance procedures with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、GSA合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行加纳法律、GSA标准及合格评定范围、G-Mark/到岸检验实践及口岸通关程序。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、GSA合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行迦納法律、GSA標準及合格評定範圍、G-Mark/到岸檢驗實踐及口岸通關程序。

answer_first.en: FFP filtering facepiece respirators entering Ghana fall under the Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) mandatory conformity-assessment regime, with destination inspection and the G-Mark scheme. Ghana Standards (GS) commonly adopt IEC/EN standards, so the practical performance benchmark is GS/EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3). Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not automatically satisfy the GSA-adopted EN 149 route. A locally established importer is required to clear goods at Tema or Takoradi, and the Labour Department occupational-safety framework governs workplace use. Grid note: Ghana is 230 V / 50 Hz (50 Hz matches China; voltage differs from China 220/380 V).
answer_first.zh: 进入加纳的FFP过滤式半面罩呼吸器受加纳标准局（GSA）强制合格评定制度约束，配合到岸检验及G-Mark制度。加纳标准（GS）通常采纳IEC/EN标准，因此实际性能基准为GS/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告不自动满足GSA采纳的EN 149路径。须由本地设立的进口商在特马或塔科拉迪口岸清关，工作场所使用受劳工部职业安全框架管辖。电网说明：加纳为230 V/50 Hz（50 Hz与中国相同；电压与中国220/380 V不同）。
answer_first.zht: 進入迦納的FFP過濾式半面罩呼吸器受迦納標準局（GSA）強制合格評定制度約束，配合到岸檢驗及G-Mark制度。迦納標準（GS）通常採納IEC/EN標準，因此實際性能基準為GS/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告不自動滿足GSA採納的EN 149路徑。須由本地設立的進口商在特馬或塔科拉迪口岸清關，工作場所使用受勞工部職業安全框架管轄。電網說明：迦納為230 V/50 Hz（50 Hz與中國相同；電壓與中國220/380 V不同）。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon change to GSA conformity-assessment scope, adopted Ghana Standards, or G-Mark / destination-inspection procedure
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official GSA, Ghana legislative, and standards-body sources preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
